elements.sent-2411-132: In this study, we have introduced a novel geometric perspective on interval posets of permutations, establishing a one-to-one correspondence between interval posets and dissections of convex polygons.
elements.sent-2411-133: This geometric approach not only provides a new way to visualize and understand interval posets but also offers a powerful tool for enumerating various subsets of these posets.
elements.sent-2411-134: Our findings demonstrate that the set of interval posets for permutations of size $n$ can be mapped to a specific subset of dissections of a convex polygon with $n+1$ sides.
elements.sent-2411-135: This correspondence has allowed us to explore interesting subsets of interval posets, such as those corresponding to block-wise simple permutations and separable permutations, and to identify their relationships with specific polygon dissections.
elements.sent-2411-136: In conclusion, the geometric perspective on interval posets opens up new avenues for research and provides a robust framework for further exploration of permutation patterns and their associated posets.
elements.sent-2411-137: Future work could extend this approach to other classes of permutations and investigate the potential applications of these geometric insights in related fields of mathematics and computer science.
